name: Always-incognito mode
description: Always opens Gboard in incognito mode to disable typing history collection and personalization.

name: Block ads, trackers, and analytics
description: Blocks ads, trackers, analytics, and unwanted content in apps and games using a hosts file.

options.title: Hosts file
options.description: The hosts file containing hosts or domains you want to block. Select a file or paste the full file path.

options.title: Redirection IP
options.description: The IP address to redirect blocked domains to. This will be used with your hosts list to block content.

options.title: Wildcard blocking
options.description: When enabled, entries like "example.com" also block subdomains like "www.example.com" and "sub.www.example.com".

name: Change package name
description: Appends ".adobo" to the package name by default. Changing the package name of the app can lead to unexpected issues.

options.title: Package name
options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.

options.title: Update permissions
options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update other permissions
options.description: Update other permissions declared by the app. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update content providers
options.description: Update content provider URI authorities. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

name: Colorize comment indent lines
description: Replaces the default gray comment indent lines with color-coded lines.

options.title: Line color 1
options.description: The hex color (#RRGGBB or #AARRGGBB) for comment indent line at depth 1.

options.title: Line color 2
options.description: The hex color (#RRGGBB or #AARRGGBB) for comment indent line at depth 2.

options.title: Line color 3
options.description: The hex color (#RRGGBB or #AARRGGBB) for comment indent line at depth 3.

options.title: Line color 4
options.description: The hex color (#RRGGBB or #AARRGGBB) for comment indent line at depth 4.

options.title: Line color 5
options.description: The hex color (#RRGGBB or #AARRGGBB) for comment indent line at depth 5.

options.title: Line color 6
options.description: The hex color (#RRGGBB or #AARRGGBB) for comment indent line at depth 6.

options.title: Line color 7
options.description: The hex color (#RRGGBB or #AARRGGBB) for comment indent line at depth 7.

options.title: Line color 8
options.description: The hex color (#RRGGBB or #AARRGGBB) for comment indent line at depth 8.

name: Deactivate Firebase Analytics
description: Deactivates Firebase Analytics and removes its associated broadcast receivers and services.

name: Deactivate Firebase Performance Monitoring
description: Deactivates the collection of performance data on app start up time, network requests, and other related metrics.

name: Disable Google Safe Browsing in WebView
description: Disables the Google Safe Browsing checks in WebView. This doesn't apply to WebView within the SDK Runtime.

name: Disable home feed auto-refresh
description: Disables the automatic refresh of the home feed after viewing a post or after being away from the app.

name: Disable home feed swipe
description: Disables the horizontal page swipe gesture used to switch feeds.

name: Disable home screen redirect
description: Disables the automatic redirect to the home screen after being away from the app or returning from the background.

name: Disable metrics collection in WebView
description: Disables the collection of diagnostic data or usage statistics that are sent to Google.

name: Disable mobile ads
description: Disables banner, interstitial, and other ad formats.

options.title: AppLovin MAX
options.description: Disable App Open, Banner & MREC, Interstitial, Native, and Rewarded ad formats.

options.title: BIGO
options.description: Disable Banner, Native, Interstitial, Pop-up, Rewarded, and Splash ad formats.

options.title: Google AdMob
options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Native, Rewarded, Rewarded Interstitial, and App Open ad formats.

options.title: Meta Audience Network
options.description: Disable Banner, Medium rectangle, Interstitial, Native, Native Banner, Rewarded Video, and Rewarded Interstitial ad formats.

options.title: Mintegral
options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Rewarded Video, Native, and Splash ad formats.

options.title: myTarget
options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Rewarded, Native, Native Banner, In-Stream Video and Audio, and Carousel ad formats.

options.title: Pangle
options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Native, Rewarded Video, and App Open ad formats.

options.title: TopOn
options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Native, Rewarded, and App Open ad formats.

options.title: Unity
options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Native, and Rewarded Video ad formats.

options.title: Liftoff Monetize
options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Native, Rewarded, and App Open ad formats.

options.title: Yandex Advertising Network
options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Native, Rewarded, App Open, InStream, and Feed ad formats.

name: Disable post detail swipe
description: Disables the horizontal swipe gesture used to navigate between posts.

name: Disable screenshot banner
description: Disables the banner that shows up after taking a screenshot.

name: Enable access points menu redesign
description: Enables the redesign of the additional actions menu.

name: Enable clipboard in incognito
description: Enables clipboard support in incognito mode.

name: Enable key shape selection
description: Enables an option to select a key shape from the theme.

name: Enable OCR feature
description: Enables the Scan Text feature to extract text from images and insert them into text fields.

name: Enable Undo feature
description: Enables the undo feature to quickly undo or correct typing mistakes.

name: Enable voice typing in incognito
description: Enables voice typing in incognito mode.

name: Hide Ask button from search bar
description: Hides the Ask button (Reddit Answers) from the search bar.

name: Hide awards
description: Hides the awards on Reddit posts and comments.

name: Hide community highlights
description: Hides the community highlights section.

name: Hide community menu badge
description: Hides the red notification badge on the community menu (hamburger menu).

name: Hide post view counts
description: Removes the "views" indicator from the post metadata.

name: Hide prominent search bar
description: Hides the new prominent search bar on the main screen. Applicable only to version 2026.24.0 and earlier.

name: Hide share count
description: Hides the share count on Reddit posts.

name: Hide upvote scores
description: Hides the scores on Reddit posts and comments.

options.title: Hide post scores
options.description: Removes scores from posts in feeds and search results.

options.title: Hide comment scores
options.description: Removes scores from comments in threads and search results.

name: Hide user community badges
description: Hides the user community badges on Reddit comments.

name: Hide user flairs
description: Hides the user flairs on Reddit comments.

name: Open external links directly
description: Opens external links directly without going through out.reddit.com.

name: Remove 9GAG's ads, trackers, and analytics
description: Removes ads, trackers, and analytics in the 9GAG app.

name: Remove ads and telemetry
description: Removes ads and telemetry everywhere.

name: Remove IMDb's ads, trackers, and analytics
description: Removes ads, trackers, and analytics in the IMDb app.

name: Remove internet permission
description: Removes unnecessary internet permission from apps that can still work without internet access.

name: Replace Google Maps API key
description: Replaces the Google Maps API key with a custom key.

options.title: Maps API Key
options.description:
This key must be a valid Google Maps API key starting with "AIzaSy". 

Follow the instructions at https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/android-sdk/get-api-key to generate a new API key if you don't have one. 

Leave it unrestricted to use it with any app (recommended), or restrict it by adding the SHA-1 fingerprint of the app's signing certificate and the package name.

name: Sanitize share links
description: Unshortens and removes the tracking query parameters from shared links.

name: Spoof Advertising ID
description: Spoofs the device's advertising ID with a string of zeros.

name: Spoof Firebase certificate hash
description: Spoofs the app's package certificate hash used by Firebase Installations so that push notifications, remote config, and other Firebase services continue to work as expected.

options.title: Certificate hash
options.description: The SHA-1 hash of the app's package certificate.

name: Spoof signature verification
description: Spoofs the signature verification when the app starts up. It is recommended to use the unmodified app to work properly.

options.title: Package name
options.description: The package name of the app, if modified. This must match the package name defined when the 'Change package name' patch is selected or as defined in the AndroidManifest.xml.

options.title: Base64-encoded signature
options.description: The base64-encoded signature from the original, unmodified APK. This extracts the certificate/signature in the APK by default if blank.

name: Toggle feature flags
description: Toggles Gboard feature flags to enable or disable experimental or hidden features.

options.title: Feature flags
options.description: The Gboard feature flags to toggle, such as experimental or hidden features.

options.title: Enable feature flags
options.description: Enables or disables all specified feature flags.
